title: Architect SFU (Selective Forwarding Unit) vs. MCU Architecture
description: Evaluate the trade-offs between P2P mesh, Selective Forwarding Unit (SFU), and Multi-point Control Unit (MCU) architectures. Architect appropriate media server solutions for multi-user real-time systems based on specific requirements.
objectives: Evaluate the trade-offs between P2P mesh, Selective Forwarding Unit (SFU), and Multi-point Control Unit (MCU) architectures.
Architect appropriate media server solutions for multi-user real-time systems based on specific requirements.
